minor_conditions.name: Light Fog
minor_conditions.description: A gentle haze that makes everything look slightly spooky and significantly harder to shoot.

minor_conditions.name: Drizzle
minor_conditions.description: Barely rain, but just enough to ruin your visibility and your mood.

minor_conditions.name: Gusty Winds
minor_conditions.description: Your bullets curve slightly. Your hair, dramatically.

minor_conditions.name: Overcast Skies
minor_conditions.description: Grey clouds loom overhead, matching your emotional state.

minor_conditions.name: Mild Static Interference
minor_conditions.description: Your comms crackle occasionally. Mostly with sarcasm.

minor_conditions.name: Dust Drift
minor_conditions.description: A light dusting of airborne misery. Not enough to kill you, just enough to annoy you.

minor_conditions.name: Low Robot Activity
minor_conditions.description: Only a few robots wandering around. They still want you dead, just less enthusiastically.

minor_conditions.name: Mild Heat
minor_conditions.description: Warm enough to sweat, not warm enough to complain about. You complain anyway.

minor_conditions.name: Cool Breeze
minor_conditions.description: Pleasant weather. Something is definitely about to go wrong.

minor_conditions.name: Patchy Fog
minor_conditions.description: Visibility varies wildly. So does your confidence.

minor_conditions.name: Light Smoke
minor_conditions.description: Something is burning nearby. Hopefully not your extraction point.

minor_conditions.name: Minor Ground Tremors
minor_conditions.description: The ground shakes occasionally. Probably unrelated to your presence. Probably.

minor_conditions.name: Weak Signal
minor_conditions.description: Your comms cut out at the worst possible times. Standard ARC experience.

minor_conditions.name: Ambient Hum
minor_conditions.description: A low-frequency hum fills the air. No one knows why. No one wants to.

major_conditions.name: Heavy Fog
major_conditions.description: Visibility reduced to 'guess and pray.' Perfect for ambushes and terrible decisions.

major_conditions.name: Acid Rain
major_conditions.description: Burns slightly. Smells worse. ARC claims it's 'within acceptable limits.'

major_conditions.name: Electrical Storm
major_conditions.description: Lightning arcs across the sky. Electronics malfunction. Hair stands up. Morale goes down.

major_conditions.name: Robot Surge
major_conditions.description: Robot activity spikes dramatically. They are everywhere. And they are loud.

major_conditions.name: Total Blackout
major_conditions.description: All lights fail. Night vision recommended. Screaming optional.

major_conditions.name: Sandstorm
major_conditions.description: Sand in your eyes. Sand in your gear. Sand in your soul.

major_conditions.name: Toxic Fog
major_conditions.description: Thick, green, and definitely not safe to breathe. ARC calls it 'atmospheric seasoning.'

major_conditions.name: Meteor Shower
major_conditions.description: Small meteors rain from the sky. Great for spectacle, terrible for survival.

major_conditions.name: Unstable Gravity
major_conditions.description: Gravity fluctuates wildly. Sometimes you float. Sometimes you crater.

major_conditions.name: ARC Signal Overload
major_conditions.description: Comms explode with static, warnings, and corporate disclaimers.

major_conditions.name: Superheated Air
major_conditions.description: The air itself burns. Hydration recommended. Survival optional.

major_conditions.name: Dimensional Rift
major_conditions.description: Reality flickers. You see things that shouldn't exist. They see you too.
